headline: Peninsula Clean Energy Rebrands as WestLight Energy; Name Change Will Appear on Utility Bills Starting July 17
summary: San Mateo and Los Banos customers to see new name on energy bills starting July 17Redwood City, CA, July 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Redwood City, CA, July 1, 2026 — Beginning today, Peninsula Clean Energy is operating under its new name: WestLight Energy. Starting July 17, customers who already receive their electricity from Peninsula Clean Energy (PCE) will begin seeing the name WestLight Energy on their monthly utility bills. Founded in 2016, the public agency procures 100% clean energy, at
